title: astragalus kopetdaghi
intro: Astragalus kopetdaghi, also known as the Kopet Dagh milkvetch, is a plant species within the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to Central Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, providing health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced stress, and enhanced overall well-being. Astragalus kopetdaghi is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or capsule, and is used in traditional medicine to support respiratory, cardiovascular, and digestive health.
